---
title: "The History of Diligent Dick, or, Truth Will Out, though it be Hid in a Well"
---

## The History of Diligent Dick, or, Truth Will Out, though it be Hid in a Well

**Author:** Hannah More
**Date:** 1829?
**Imprint:** London: Evans

### Notes

One of the Cheap Repository Tracts.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
